content.text:
I conducted a search for tweets specifically about the $AEON crypto token on the Base chain with the contract address 0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3 within the specified date range. After filtering out unrelated content (e.g., Resident Evil fandom references to "Aeon"), I found only 3 relevant tweets. I've prioritized them by engagement level (likes and reposts) and insightfulness about the token/project. Here they are in a numbered list:
